scripts.lighthouse: astro build && node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); const p = spawn('npx', ['astro', 'preview'], { shell: true }); setTimeout(() => { spawn('npx', ['lighthouse', 'http://localhost:4321/Portfolio', '--view'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }).on('close', () => p.kill()); }, 3000);"
